# Codex Task Issue Template

## Objective

State the exact change to make.

## Files in scope

- `path/to/file`

## Files out of scope

- No AC mains diagrams
- No 48 V high-current power distribution
- No E-stop power-circuit design
- No UL/NRTL/AHJ claims
- No structural-use validation

## Approved wording

Paste exact approved wording here when changing safety, legal, electrical, or commercial text.

## Non-goals

State what Codex must not attempt.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Required labels

`codex-ready`, plus one or more of `needs-owner-review`, `needs-legal-review`, `needs-electrical-review`, `release-blocker`.

## Suggested Codex prompt

`@codex implement this issue exactly. Do not expand scope. Do not invent legal, electrical, certification, or structural-safety language. Preserve the public low-voltage-only boundary.`
